# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of this pipeline is currently supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues. If you discover a vulnerability, please report it by creating a private Draft Security Advisory in this repository.
